name: To Rome For Love
overview: Diann Valentine takes five beautiful women—Gina Neely, Shay Atkins, Nakita McGraw, Ashley Russell, and Mercedes Young—to Italy. Each in a different stage of their life with unique stories of love, but all share in the same challenges of dating as a black woman in America.

trailers.title: To Rome for Love: Official First Look at Season 1 | Bravo
